title: Update bud/from CLI help to contain indicator for --dns=none
body:
The command line help should contain the indicator that `--dns=none` is
possble to disable the creation of the `/etc/resolv.conf` file.

comments.body: Restarted the failing Ubuntu test.  It's been problematic and not related to these changes.
